calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-13-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff 1998 Wu Family LLC is present. Represented by Pit Chu Wu.
Attorney Saul Ferster appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Roberto Aguilar Andrade is present.
Attorney Kristin Messer representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JUN-18-2012 is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-11-2012 Off Calendar
